fault_hypothesis: The rate limit check on line 66 uses a strict greater-than comparison (`>`), which incorrectly allows a new event when the number of recent events is exactly equal to the limit. The comparison should be greater-than-or-equal-to (`>=`) to correctly block events at the limit.

constraints.intent: The decision logic should not treat the case of being exactly at the limit as being under the limit.
If a checkout is allowed (i.e., this branch is taken), the number of recent events must be strictly less than the limit.
A checkout should be allowed if and only if the number of recent events is strictly less than the limit.
